# CodeGrind Engagement Review Packet

## Campaign

- Title: CodeGrind DSA Practice Meets Cyberpunk Tower Defense Update
- Summary: Highlighting CodeGrind's updated tower-defense-themed problem visualization and Azure OpenAI-powered guidance, with new UI polish and real-time scoring.
- Slug: codegrind-dsa-practice-tower-defense-update
- Content kind: image

## Media plan

- Media source: generated

## Brief

- Core message: CodeGrind now blends practical DSA practice with a cyberpunk tower-defense aesthetic, featuring an improved real-time editor, Azure OpenAI assistance, and refreshed problem-to-tower mappings that visualize programming concepts as defensive structures. See faster loading, smarter AI guidance, and a more immersive learning experience.
- CTA: Try a live problem now and watch towers generate code snippets as you solve.
- Visual brief: Static product-like reveal image: CodeGrind editor interface with cyberpunk tower visuals, clear problem panel, and AI chat, plus shimmering towers representing ForLoop, IfCondition, and Function. Include subtle UI polish cues and a dark neon color palette.

## Review notes

- Do not merge until the copy and selected media are acceptable for public posting.
- If the media choice is wrong, update the review PR branch or rerun the workflow with a different media manifest.
- Merging this PR only auto-posts engagement content if the Pages repo has the matching engagement-dispatch workflow installed.
